## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Roles and responsibilities remain clear.
- [ ] Navigation and cross-links are updated.
- [ ] Validator or checklist is updated when the rule can be checked.
- [ ] `./tests/validate-repository-structure.sh` passes.
- [ ] Follow-up triggers are documented when work is intentionally deferred.
